account.title: Status
account.delete_confirm: Delete for good? This cannot be undone.
account.intro_body: Keep your learning data safe even if you change or lose your phone.
account.benefit_title: Create an account to protect your data
account.benefit_sub: Keep your progress even when you change devices
account.hero_hello: Welcome! Your progress will be kept safe.
account.confirm_hint: Open the link in the email to confirm, then log in. If you can't find it, please also check your spam/junk folder.
account.err_network: Connection failed. Please check your network.
account.err_weak_pw: Password must be at least 8 characters.
account.err_unconfirmed: Email not confirmed yet. Please open the link we sent.
account.err_oauth: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
profile.privacyAccount: If you create an account, your email and learning data are stored on Supabase servers (Tokyo region) and used for backup and restoring on a new device. You can delete them anytime from "Delete account" in the app.
badges.collection_hint: Keep studying to unlock the grayed-out titles one by one.
browse.searchPlaceholder: Search by word, reading, or meaning
browse.title: Dictionary
cards.title: Build your vocabulary every day!
cards.reco_sub: AI spots the words you got wrong before and drills them until they stick.
study.reco_sub: Exam-style practice focused on your weak sections.
worddrill.produce_ask: Build the word in kana that matches the meaning
worddrill.build_ask: Build the grammar phrase for the blank in kana
worddrill.meaning_ask: Which meaning matches this grammar point?
worddrill.empty: Problems for this level are coming soon

dl.body: Listening audio (about {size}). Download once to listen offline anytime.

home.ai_advice: Today's tip: one set of "{action}". It fills your weak point and raises readiness.
home.ai_caption: Auto-analyzed from your study data (on-device, nothing sent)
home.ai_keep: Keep your current level and polish weak areas to stay safe.
home.ai_pace: At this pace you'll reach the passing zone in about {days} days ({perDay} words/day).
home.ai_pace_none: Keep studying and your estimated days-to-pass will appear.
home.ai_start_body: Today's Recommendation automatically serves your weak points and timely reviews. Start it and your readiness will be analyzed here.
home.ai_status: Your readiness is {score}%, and the pass line is {min}%.
home.ai_passprob: Your current pass chance is about {n}%.
home.ai_today_growth: You mastered {n} words today! Daily progress is the surest path to passing.
home.ai_improving: Your pass chance rose {n} points 📈 You're growing steadily!
home.ai_streak: {n}-day study streak. Consistency is the biggest shortcut to passing.
home.ai_streak0: Solve even one question today to restart your streak.
home.ai_weak: Your weakest area is "{cat}" ({pct}%). Focusing here is most effective.
home.exam_speed_up: Pick up the pace a little and you'll make it
home.passprob_trend_empty: Keep studying to see your daily pass-chance trend.
home.growth_empty_hint: Your progress will be recorded each day you study.
home.pace_muted: Keep studying every day to see "days until passing zone"
home.pace_ok: In the passing zone! Keep it up.
home.pass_prob_hint: Estimated chance of clearing every section cutoff and the total at once (｜ mark = 80% safe zone).
home.ring_caption: Each section = study coverage × retention. ｜ is the pass line; scores range from 0–100.
home.stats_caption: "Learned" = words retained by answering correctly in a 4-choice test
learntestsession.learn_hint: You'll be tested on these {n} words right after learning them.
learntestsession.no_items_sub: You've already studied today's items in this section.
learntestsession.test_hint: Recall what you learned and choose from 4 options.
listening.hint: Listen to the audio and answer (you can hide the script).
listening.hint_hatsuwa: Look at the picture and the situation, then choose the best thing to say.
listening.dev_text: Dev preview: in the real app this is audio/illustration. Shown here as text.
mock.all_ok: 🎯 No weak points in vocabulary or grammar.
mock.drill_cta: Review vocabulary & grammar weak points ({n} questions)
mock.hint: Treat it like the real exam — choose from 4 options.
mywords.title: My Words
mywords.shelf_hint: Save answers and kanji with "+ My Words" and they'll gather here.
onboarding.exam_jft_desc: JF Test for Basic Japanese (work / SSW)
onboarding.desc_n3: Intermediate level. Ability to read most everyday texts.
onboarding.desc_n4: Basic level. For those who have completed beginner courses (e.g. Minna no Nihongo).
onboarding.desc_n5: The easiest entry level. Starts with hiragana, basic vocabulary and grammar.
onboarding.level_hint: You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.title: Let's Get Started
profile.dataSourceBody:
・JLPT level classification & word lists: Jonathan Waller (tanos.co.uk / CC BY)
・Dictionary data (kanji, word meanings): JMdict & KANJIDIC2 © EDRDG (CC BY-SA, modified)
・Kanji stroke order & writing: HanziWriter © Jack Huang (MIT License)
・Kanji stroke/writing data: animCJK (parsimonhi) — Arphic Public License
profile.examJftHint: JFT-Basic runs year-round (CBT). Pick the test date you booked on the calendar.
profile.jft_note: JFT-Basic is a single test (no level selection). Pass = 200 total points (A2.2).
profile.nativeLangHint: This is the app display language. It is set automatically based on your device language.
profile.privacyBody:
Mainichi JLPT Privacy Policy

This app stores learning data (readiness, study history, and settings) only on your device and does not transmit or collect it externally.

• No account registration is required, and we do not collect personal information such as your name or email address.
• We do not track behavior via advertising or analytics tools.
• Tapping "Rate This App" launches the OS's built-in review feature (App Store / Google Play). Use is subject to each platform's policies.
• Dictionary data uses JMdict / KANJIDIC2 (© EDRDG); JLPT level classification uses Jonathan Waller (tanos.co.uk). Example sentences and questions are original to this app.

Data can be completely erased from your device via "Reset Study Data" or by uninstalling the app. This policy may be revised without notice.

Anonymous usage data (v1.1+): To improve the app, we collect anonymous study and usage data (readiness, pass chance, coverage, learned counts, streak, mock results, per-question correctness, screen usage, session time, error reports, device type/app version). It is not linked to your identity and not used for tracking; no personal info or IP is stored. You can turn it off anytime in Settings → Share usage data.
profile.reminderHint: You will receive a notification at this time every day. Notifications are delivered on physical devices (may be limited on Web / some Expo Go builds).
profile.resetConfirm: Tap again to erase all data
profile.telemetryHint: Anonymously share your study progress to help improve the app (no personal info, no tracking, off anytime).
profile.termsBody:
Mainichi JLPT Terms of Use

• This app is designed to support study toward passing the JLPT (Japanese Language Proficiency Test).
• Indicators such as "Readiness" and "Passing Zone" are study guides only and do not guarantee exam results.
• This app is not affiliated with the JLPT administering organizations (Japan Foundation / Japan Educational Exchanges and Services).
• The developer is not liable for any damages arising from use of this app.
• Features and content are subject to change without notice.
• Dictionary and example sentence data are used in accordance with their respective licenses (EDRDG, CC BY, etc.).
profile.listeningAudioHint_download: Download a level's audio in one batch and play it offline anytime (recommended on Wi-Fi).
profile.listeningAudioHint_stream: Stream each clip from the server as you play it. Saves storage but needs a connection each time.
profile.title: Settings
quiz.hint: Choose from 4 options. Words you miss will come back for review.
reading.hint: Read the passage and answer the questions.
sessionsummary.heading: Progress This Session
study.foot: Retention gradually fades if you skip days. Keep the 🔥 going by studying a little every day.
study.no_due: No reviews due today. Move on to new words.
study.title: Practice modeled on the real exam
test.band_hint_measured: The more mock exams you take, the narrower the ± range and the more accurate your readiness becomes.
test.band_hint_unmeasured: Take an exam first to measure where you stand.
test.foot: * Mini = language knowledge section only (indicative). Full mock exam covers all sections for higher accuracy. Neither guarantees exam results.
test.full_note: Exactly the same sections, question count, and time as the real exam — a realistic diagnosis of your pass rate.
test.history_cap: Score for last {n} exams (newest on right — higher = closer to passing)
test.jft_note: Script & Vocabulary, Conversation & Expression, Listening (audio ×2), Reading. 250 points / pass 200 (A2.2). Exam-style (sectioned, listening ×2).
test.sub: Check your skills and find your weak points.
test.title: Mock Exam
touroverlay.step_cheer_body: Even 5 minutes a day adds up. We're rooting for you all the way. Let's do this together! 🔥
touroverlay.step_dict_body: The Dictionary tab. Search and browse vocabulary, kanji, and grammar. Words you've learned get a ✓.
touroverlay.step_gauge_body: How close you are to passing your target level. The big number is your readiness; the ｜ mark is the pass line. Study to grow it.
touroverlay.step_growth_body: How many words you've added each day. The more you study, the steeper the curve.
touroverlay.step_rings_body: Readiness for each of the 4 sections: Kanji & Vocabulary, Grammar, Reading, and Listening. Spot your weak areas at a glance.
touroverlay.step_streak_body: Records every day you study. Day streak, weekly view, and calendar all help build the habit.
touroverlay.step_study_body: The Study tab. Pick Kanji & Vocabulary, Grammar, Reading, or Listening for 4-choice practice. Missed items come back until you get them right.
touroverlay.step_test_body: The Test tab. Challenge yourself with mini or full mock exams. Results are recorded and reflected in your growth chart.
touroverlay.step_today_body: Start here every day. The app automatically picks the section where you need the most work.
tour.home_b: One pass-% with a confidence band, a glowing rank badge, section-by-section accuracy, an AI coach — plus growth, streak, and badges as you scroll.
tour.study_b: Kanji & Vocabulary, Grammar, Reading, Listening — quick 4-choice drills. Missed items return until you master them. Today’s pick targets your weakest area.
tour.test_b: Take a Mini (1/3) or Full mock exam — same sections and timing as the real test — to confirm your readiness.
tour.dict_b: Look up any word, kanji, or grammar point by JLPT level, anytime.
tour.cheer_b: A little every day adds up. Good luck on your JLPT!
tour.settings_b: Set your target exam & level, exam date, theme, reminders, and language — all in Settings.
reading.empty: No reading content for this section yet.
tour.home1_b: The big ring shows your pass-readiness and title. Below it, see each section’s status, the AI Coach’s advice, and your pass-chance trend at a glance.
tour.home2_b: Scroll down for your learning growth, kanji/vocab/grammar coverage, your study streak, and the title badges you’ve earned.
study.tap_daimon: Tap a button (A/B…) to drill 10 by section
study.card_ring_hint: Tap a ring to start problems by section
notif.title: Notifications
status.title: STATUS
status.coverage_hint: Learned ÷ total. Fills up as you study.
shop.title: Sakura Shell Shop
coach.greet: So glad to see you today. Let's take it easy together 🌸
coach.streak: {n} days in a row — I'm really happy for you ✨
coach.streak0: Want to try just a little bit together today?
coach.pass_high: You've come so far. It's almost within reach 🌸
coach.pass_mid: You're getting closer, little by little. No need to rush.
coach.pass_low: Slow is perfectly fine. I'm right here beside you.
coach.weak: Shall we peek at "{s}" today? One at a time is okay.
coach.learned: You've learned {n} words already. That's really wonderful.
coach.tip1: Rest when you're tired. Your own pace matters most 🌸
coach.tip2: Even a little done today is real progress.

Scored in the same structure as the real exam (Vocab/Grammar/Reading/Listening).
*Guide is for {level}; varies by level.
